name: Whole Wheat Maple Snickerdoodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift whole wheat flour, cream of tarter, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon a second time. Set aside.
2. In a medium-size bowl, cream the butter until fluffy, scraping down the sides of the bowl.
3. With the mixer still running, add the maple syrup in a thin stream, followed by the eggs, one at a time.
4. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture, stirring just until blended.
5. Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
6. Preheat the oven to 400°F and put the sugar in a small bowl.
7. With lightly floured hands, roll the dough into balls about 1 1/4 inches in diameter.
8. Roll the balls in the sugar, then place on an ungreased baking sheet, leaving 2 inches between them.
9. Bake for 10 minutes, just until tops no longer yield to light finger pressure.
10. Transfer to a rack and cool.
11. Store in an airtight container.
